stories: Good morning Sean, it's Thursday, the seventh of May, 2026
Here's your fun fact: in all of American history, not a single U
President has ever died in the month of May
Every other month has claimed at least one — but May has a perfect record
Private appointment at eight-thirty, then the Digital Portfolio QBR at nine until half-ten on Teams
Triage Time from ten-thirty to eleven, then the Tax Diagnostic at eleven
Noon is the L4 EAS Fortnightly, lunch from half-twelve, then a catch-up with Jack at one-thirty on Webex
T400 Performance and Reward session at two, GBSLT Quarterly pre-work blocked from three to four, coffee with Gyanam at four on Level 18
It's Wednesday evening, the sixth of May, 2026
Here's something to ease you into the evening: on this day in 1889, the Eiffel Tower opened its doors to the public for the very first time, as part of the World's Fair in Paris
Gustave Eiffel had barely finished building it — it had only been completed five weeks earlier
A hundred and thirty-seven years on, it's probably the most photographed structure on Earth
Your morning kicks off with a private appointment at eight-thirty, then straight into the Digital Portfolio QBR at nine — that runs until half-ten
Triage Time follows at ten-thirty, then a Tax Diagnostic at eleven
Pre-work for the GBSLT Quarterly takes the three o'clock slot, and the day closes out with coffee with Gyanam at four
It's a structural shift that would meaningfully deepen the local market
Good morning Sean, it's Wednesday, the sixth of May 2026
Here's a fact to kick off your Wednesday: on this day in 1954, Roger Bannister became the first person to run a mile in under four minutes — at a track in Oxford
Sports commentators had called it physically impossible
Looking at your day — morning run from seven to eight, then pre-read reviews at nine
Two review blocks at ten: the FY26 GBSO Full Year Performance Review, then the Potash GBS PMO CLT update
The SAP duplicate PO call is at midday, lunch at twelve-thirty, and the Potash ERP Stabilisation Forum at one-thirty
A private appointment at two, Tax Diagnostic at three, one-to-one with Reg at three-thirty, then pre-work for the GBSLT Quarterly at four, and Big Rock Time to close out at five
In Singapore, PM Lawrence Wong's May Day speech continues to generate attention
